textByHash.15469fe18e204f10a81304f1f8a0e7e509796a24: Sorry, but I just don't think you are renowned enough as a fisherwoman.
textByHash.2473852e81999abb80edfe43db59f918b67ab2e1: G'day, only the best fishers are allowed onto the fishing platform. You need a fishing level of 82.
textByHash.310837d0e94da1e5fd517a7add91b83577eb93e2: for the minnows you catch, 'cos them I can catch no problem!
textByHash.33b6f7ab7798e3897b4bd2c6557aa70647f92e37: Oh, well I wanted to catch some minnows so I could use 'em as bait, but the little blighters are just too quick! I managed to get 'em all rounded up over on my fishing platform, but I still can't catch 'em!
textByHash.485aacc4f0beaf3eedceb4ef89389fac5dfc92a7: serious enough to have the right attire.
textByHash.6184ece80585b973da379e0a06cb8cb2fc6a6179: I can't trade you any sharks while you don't have any space for them!
textByHash.65b5d7557154a594e837470964f633b91473ff7f: Have you got any minnows for trade? I have plenty of nice, fresh sharks waiting for ya!
textByHash.693d3121676776e49fd141a5cebfbc963a5e4986: Ripper! You certainly seem to be the real deal, so sure, go ahead and take the boat over there. Oh, and don't worry about wearing that angling gear if yous don't want to, I just wanted to see that you took fishing
textByHash.7f2aa5c218809398bce287e65a46534df81d2fb5: Well I don't know. I don't want to be letting just anyone onto me fishing platform! But I guess if you could show me that you are a worthy fisher than that would be okay. I can even give you shark in exchange
textByHash.7fa5fe31a0c069e34fd734a2420df853c248be7c: Well you should be very experienced in the art of fishing, own the proper attire, and be recognised by your peers as a great fisherman.
textByHash.81eb044aee5813dd7991ce5f7b4384c59e0f31ac: Sorry, but I just don't think you are experienced enough.
textByHash.82784b019c90333c908c830fdfdd111e58fc68e4: You'll be needing at least 40 minnows to trade for a shark! Come back and see me when you have some more!
textByHash.93a795e4e0924cb2c0522547e63d197103c0e39a: I can give you a shark for every 40 minnows that you give me. How many sharks would you like?
textByHash.bba0eda8a45a77ab41ce22f382d7199f91bd24c4: Sorry, but I just don't think you are renowned enough as a fisherman.
textByHash.d98b39ccc273a2d7c97fc561450de74a19d5d335: Oh G'day! Sorry, didn't see you there!
textByHash.de8d84130ca9d94b3a17c0a2d5cd63e55b42c0f0: I don't think I have given you access to my fishing platform. Come and speak to me if you would like to get access.
textByHash.ead5de3d1b06857ca611e5943ac17f108a9a550b: What I need is someone who can catch 'em for me!
textByHash.efb08cb3c63b09e6856ce266de79f9e869e0544c: Sorry, but I just don't think you are wearin' suitable fishing gear.
textByHash.f0595a8710b26357d82959eef8f4382ed38e4143: Then, to make things worse, any time I do finally catch some, those bloody flying fish jump out at me and gobble up me minnows!
